added.question: [97.119(a)] Which of the following is required when making on-the-air test transmissions?
Which of the following is a “talkgroup”?
added.correct_text: An identifier used by DMR to organize radio traffic so that those who want to hear the group aren’t bothered by other radio traffic

added.question: Which of the following requires certification by a civil defense agency?
Which of these frequencies travels at the highest velocity in free space?
added.correct_text: All radio frequencies travel at the same velocity

added.question: How does an ohmmeter measure the resistance of a circuit or component?
added.correct_text: By applying a small current and measuring the resulting voltage
